name: Friends of the Library Canvas Tote Bag
description: Sturdy natural canvas tote bag printed with the Welles-Turner Memorial Library logo. Perfect for carrying books home from the library.

name: Welles-Turner Library Logo Bookmark Set (4-pack)
description: Set of 4 laminated bookmarks featuring the Welles-Turner Memorial Library logo and Glastonbury, CT. Great stocking stuffers or book club gifts.

name: Friends of the Library Ceramic Mug
description: White 12oz ceramic mug with Welles-Turner Memorial Library logo and the Friends of the Library seal. Dishwasher safe.

name: Mixed Used Book Bundle
description: A hand-curated bundle of 3-4 gently used books from the Friends of the Library quarterly sale surplus. Genres vary: literary fiction, mystery, natural history, and more.

name: Friends of the Library Canvas Tote Bag – Large
description: Extra-large natural canvas tote with reinforced handles and Welles-Turner Library logo. Fits a full week of library books with room for a reusable water bottle.

name: Welles-Turner Library Single Bookmark
description: Single laminated bookmark with the Welles-Turner Memorial Library logo on the front and a reading quote on the back. Great gift or impulse purchase.

name: Friends of the Library Travel Mug
description: Insulated stainless steel travel mug with Friends of the Library logo. Keeps beverages warm for 4 hours. BPA-free lid.

name: Literary Fiction Used Book Bundle
description: Curated bundle of 3 gently used literary fiction titles from the Friends of the Library quarterly sale surplus. Selected by our retired head librarian.

name: British Mystery Used Book Bundle
description: Three gently used British mystery novels hand-picked from the Friends quarterly book sale. Ideal for rainy afternoons and a warm cup of tea.

name: Friends of the Library Tote Bag – Navy
description: Navy canvas tote bag with the Welles-Turner Memorial Library logo in cream. A classic colorway loved by library regulars.

name: Welles-Turner Library Bookmark Set (8-pack)
description: Value pack of 8 laminated bookmarks — ideal for book clubs, classrooms, or as gifts. Includes two seasonal designs alongside the library logo standard.

name: Friends of the Library Two-Mug Gift Set
description: Two Friends of the Library ceramic mugs gift-boxed together. Perfect for book club pairs, partners, or holiday gifting.

name: Natural History Used Book Bundle
description: Three gently used natural history and nature writing titles. Great for readers who enjoy the outdoors, birdwatching, and the Connecticut seasons.

name: Friends of the Library Tote and Mug Bundle
description: Canvas tote bag and ceramic mug bundled together at a discount. A popular gift for new library card holders and community supporters.

name: Friends of the Library Tote Bag – Forest Green
description: Forest green canvas tote with the Welles-Turner Library logo in white. A seasonal favorite through autumn.

name: Welles-Turner Illustrated Bookmark – Hosta Garden
description: Illustrated bookmark featuring the perennial garden at Welles-Turner Memorial Library. A favorite among garden club members and library volunteers.

name: Young Adult Fiction Used Book Bundle
description: Three gently used young adult fiction titles, curated with middle school and high school readers in mind. Great for summer reading.

name: Friends of the Library Tote Bag – Burgundy
description: Burgundy canvas tote bag with the Welles-Turner Library logo. A warm-season clearance color available while supplies last.

name: Friends of the Library Mug – Large 16oz
description: Oversized 16oz ceramic mug with the Friends of the Library logo. Currently out of stock; next batch expected for fall.

name: Complete Library Gift Bundle – Tote, Mug, Bookmarks
description: The full Friends of the Library gift bundle: one canvas tote bag, one ceramic mug, and one 4-pack of bookmarks. Wrapped in tissue and tied with a ribbon for easy gifting.
